name: n8n Workflow Automation
description: Custom n8n automation pipelines connecting your tools, APIs, and AI models — no-code to full-code, deployed and maintained for you.

name: AI Tool Configuration (OpenClaw)
description: End-to-end setup and fine-tuning of AI agent toolchains — prompt engineering, tool wiring, and orchestration via OpenClaw and compatible frameworks.

name: Local AI Hardware Hosting
description: Self-hosted open-source model deployment on dedicated hardware — Ollama, llama.cpp, and friends. Your data stays local, costs stay low.

name: LoRA Fine-Tuning & RAG Pipelines
description: Custom model adaptation via LoRA fine-tuning and Retrieval-Augmented Generation — train on your data, serve with your infrastructure.

name: Personal & Business AI Consulting
description: Strategic AI advisory for individuals and businesses — from choosing the right model to architecting a full AI-first workflow stack.

name: AI Agent Marketplace
description: A curated catalogue of pre-built AI agents you can deploy in minutes — purpose-built for common business workflows.
